mapper.select: SELECT qws.question_id, q.stem, c.name AS category_name, qws.wrong_count, qws.answered_count, GROUP_CONCAT(qt.tag_name ORDER BY qt.sort_order ASC SEPARATOR '||') AS tags FROM question_wrong_stat qws INNER JOIN question q ON q.id = qws.question_id INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = q.category_id LEFT JOIN question_tag qt ON qt.question_id = q.id WHERE qws.student_id = #{studentId} AND qws.wrong_count > 0 GROUP BY qws.question_id, q.stem, c.name, qws.wrong_count, qws.answered_count ORDER BY qws.wrong_count DESC, qws.answered_count DESC, qws.question_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_wrong_stat ( student_id, question_id, answered_count, wrong_count, last_answered_at, last_wrong_at, version ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{questionId}, #{answeredDelta}, #{wrongDelta}, #{lastAnsweredAt}, #{lastWrongAt}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE answered_count = answered_count + #{answeredDelta}, wrong_count = wrong_count + #{wrongDelta}, last_answered_at = #{lastAnsweredAt}, last_wrong_at = CASE WHEN #{wrongDelta} > 0 THEN #{lastWrongAt} ELSE last_wrong_at END, version = version + 1
